tenant.created: Raised when a tenant is provisioned.
plan.published: Raised when a hosting plan version becomes active.
node.registration.created: Raised when an operator creates a one-time node registration token.
site.created: Raised when desired site state is persisted.
site.scheduled: Raised when the scheduler selects a node.
site.provisioned: Raised when the agent creates runtime isolation.
ssl.order.created: Raised when a certificate order is queued.
dns.zone.synced: Raised after PowerDNS state is applied.
scheduler.placement.selected: Raised when the placement engine selects a node.
scheduler.placement.rejected: Raised when no node satisfies hard constraints.
metering.sample.recorded: Raised when site usage is sampled.
metering.aggregate.updated: Raised when usage buckets are updated.
enforcement.action.queued: Raised when throttle or suspension is queued.
ha.failover.detected: Raised when a node heartbeat expires.
ha.recovery.queued: Raised when site recovery is planned.
storage.replication.queued: Raised when a snapshot replication job is queued.
edge.route.published: Raised when edge routing intent changes.
security.request.scored: Raised when a request receives a WAF/bot/anomaly decision.
